steps.title: Find the connecting idea
steps.content: The first sentence establishes Whitney's mission: championing avant-garde art and helping artists gain publicity. The second sentence narrates a specific action that illustrates this mission. The key signal is that the second sentence shows how she pursued her stated goal.

steps.title: Match the transition to the purpose
steps.content: ”To this end” means “to accomplish this goal.” It correctly expresses that the second sentence's actions were taken to fulfill the mission in the first. The other choices fail: “In other words” treats the second as a restatement, “In contrast” falsely implies opposition, and “Granted” wrongly signals concession before contradiction. That matches choice A — A is correct.
